lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission function as new. The exterior is free of any scratches, dents, or rust. The interior shows no signs of wear and remains in original condition.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and visible damage to both the exterior and interior. It requires extensive repairs and is currently not in reliable operating condition.

Looking for a dependable ride that won't break the bank? This vehicle is ready for its next adventure! While it shows some honest wear from its time on the road, it remains a solid and reliable choice for anyone looking for great value. It's a functional, well-loved car that still has plenty of life left in it!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior is clean with only minor cosmetic blemishes consistent with its age, such as a few small stone chips on the hood. The interior is in great shape, showing minimal wear on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car is solid, starts reliably, and drives smoothly. It has a complete service history, and all major components are functioning as intended. This is a dependable vehicle ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows visible signs of its age and mileage. The exterior paint has some fading on the hood and roof, along with a few noticeable scratches and a small dent on the rear bumper. Inside, the cabin is clean but the upholstery shows moderate wear, and the air conditioning takes a moment to get cold. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently, though it will likely need new tires and a brake service in the near future. It is a functional, honest vehicle for someone who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional mechanical integrity and refined aesthetic appeal. This unit has been meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance and long-term reliability. Offering a sophisticated balance of luxury and utility, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking high-caliber quality and proven durability.

Hey there! 👋 I’m looking for a new home for my trusty car! It’s been such a reliable ride and is still in wonderful shape, ready for plenty more adventures. It’s super comfy, drives great, and has been really well-loved over the years. If you’re looking for a solid, dependable set of wheels that’s ready to go, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six power plant, delivering linear throttle response via six individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. Power is managed through a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis integrity has been addressed with rear subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings, while the suspension dynamics are maintained by Bilstein dampers for precise turn-in. Mechanically robust, this unit has undergone critical preventative maintenance including a rod bearing service and a full cooling system overhaul. It represents a mechanically sound, driver-focused example with a well-documented service history.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Maintenance up to date.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and represents a fantastic balance of reliability and style. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, though close inspection reveals a few minor stone chips on the front bumper consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the premium leather seats show only light softening, and the dashboard remains free of any cracks or fading. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health with a documented service history, having recently undergone a full fluid flush and brake inspection. It drives straight and true, offering the smooth performance you expect from a well-cared-for machine. This is a solid, honest vehicle ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without any looming maintenance concerns.

Presented for your consideration is this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and sophisticated styling. This motorcar has been curated to meet exacting standards, demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. It represents a distinguished choice for the professional seeking both reliability and a commanding presence on the road. Fully inspected and ready for immediate acquisition.

This expertly maintained vehicle presents a distinguished opportunity for the selective motorist. Characterized by robust mechanical performance and a well-preserved exterior, the automobile reflects a history of diligent care and consistent servicing. It offers a refined driving experience, ensuring both immediate reliability and enduring value. We invite you to acquire a specimen that exemplifies structural integrity and operational excellence.

Hey there! I’m looking for a new home for my trusty ride. It’s been so reliable and still looks fantastic on the road! It’s got plenty of life left and is totally ready for your next big adventure. I’ve taken really good care of it, and I just know you’re going to love how it handles. Feel free to reach out with any questions—let's get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS. Paired with a precise Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox, the drivetrain remains robust with recent rod bearing service and a reinforced rear subframe. The chassis benefits from refreshed bushings and a factory-spec M Variable Differential Lock for optimal corner-exit traction. Finished in Carbon Black, the exterior shows minor road wear consistent with enthusiast use, while the interior retains its driver-focused ergonomics. Recent cooling system overhaul ensures thermal stability under high-load conditions.
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Regular service history. Clean title. Firm price.

It’s got a few miles under its belt, but it’s still got plenty of life left and has been super dependable for me. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition for its age. The exterior shines with a deep gloss, showing only the minor road wear one would expect from a car that has been driven and enjoyed. Inside, the cabin is a testament to careful ownership; the leather upholstery is supple and free of major blemishes, and all electronics—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—function perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a documented service history that includes recent fluid changes and a fresh set of performance tires. It offers a balanced, responsive driving experience that feels tight and reliable. Whether you’re looking for a dependable daily driver or a weekend cruiser that still turns heads, this car delivers exceptional value and peace of mind.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved and taken care of over the years. It’s the perfect, reliable daily driver that still looks great hitting the road. I've had some wonderful memories in this car, and I’m sure you will too! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Available is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 inline-six powerplant with high-pressure Double VANOS and individual throttle bodies for immediate throttle response. This example benefits from a reinforced rear subframe and a recently serviced limited-slip differential. The chassis remains taut with upgraded polyurethane bushings and Bilstein dampers, ensuring the 50/50 weight distribution is fully exploited. Finished in Carbon Black, the exterior exhibits minor road wear consistent with its mechanical health, while the interior maintains its structural integrity. Mechanically sound with documented rod bearing replacement, this M3 delivers a visceral, high-revving experience for the discerning purist.
Solid vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance. Clean interior. Ready for immediate sale.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents the perfect balance of performance and daily practicality. The exterior retains its deep factory luster, showing only the lightest signs of careful use consistent with its age, such as minor stone chips on the lower fascia. Inside, the cabin feels fresh and inviting; the premium upholstery remains supple and free of tears, while every feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having recently undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection and a fresh oil service. It starts effortlessly, shifts smoothly through all gears, and provides a quiet, composed ride on the highway. Included are the original owner’s manuals and a complete folder of service records detailing its consistent maintenance history. This is a turn-key example, ready for its next owner to enjoy without delay.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning owner. Every component has been rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic consistency. A premier opportunity for the professional seeking a reliable, high-caliber automobile.
